sections.title: Attempting to enter the sepulchre before speaking with him

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I wouldn't advise going down there before you know the risks, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Welcome adventurer, to the Hallowed Sepulchre. Are you here to claim some of the treasure within? It seems like the kind of activity one like you would appreciate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Treasure? What treasure? And what do you mean by 'one like me'?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I mean you're not one of the inhabitants of this city. We could use someone of your talents.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I mean you're not one of the inhabitants of this city... although you do smell and look like one. We could use someone of your talents.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh? I can't say I'm not interested. What do you propose?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: This place was built long before the city of Darkmeyer existed, back when this land was known as Hallowvale.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Sepulchre was used as a resting place for Hallowvale's loyal followers of Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Before they were driven out by the vampyres, the Saradominists used their magic to safeguard this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Safeguard how?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The dead here were buried with the wealth they had in life. To protect these riches, the Saradominists enchanted the statues within the Sepulchre to create various defences.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Many have tried and failed to obtain the prizes buried here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... So I presume you want me to get some of this treasure for you? How should I go about doing it?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We don't care for a lot of what is kept here. We are only interested in the old currency of this land.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: If you find any of these Hallowed marks, I'd be willing to take them off your hands. In exchange, I can provide tools that can help you within the Hallowed Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You can keep whatever else you find for yourself.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You should know, only the most agile of adventurers will have success down there. You'll need to use your reflexes to overcome the traps within.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Sepulchre has five floors in total, each more dangerous than the last. I hope you prove competent enough to make it all the way down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any information about what kind of traps I can expect?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The statues have been enchanted to shoot fire, lightning and arrows. Some also throw swords. There are also tiles that when stepped on, will teleport you somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like the perfect challenge for me! Is there anything else I should know?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes... It seems that there is another safeguard which prevents anyone from spending too long within the Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You'll only have so much time before the magic within seals both the coffins and the stairs leading to the next floor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on a second... If the doors to the next floor close, then how will I escape?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The priests who built this place had a teleportation system. The magical obelisks they used can be found at the end of each floor. These obelisks can be used to transport you back here.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: However, we have found that the obelisks only respond to those they perceive to be followers of Saradomin. I'd strongly advise against wearing items of any other god.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, but what if I'm in the middle of a floor and can't make it to an obelisk?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I see you are cautious adventurer. That is wise. You can use any teleport spell to escape from the Hallowed Sepulchre. However, you may also find these of use.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: These teleport crystals were enchanted using the magic of the obelisks. They can be used to teleport to this lobby. I can sell you more when you run out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'll make sure to put them to good use.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information. I'll keep an eye out for some of those Hallowed marks.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: That would be... appreciated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Like you, I am not from here. I represent a group who are very interested in the Hallowed marks found within the Hallowed Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, I helped out a very similar individual to yourself over at the Theatre of Blood. Any connection?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: So you're the one who the master spoke of. I am aware of your contributions. Helping us out here will earn yourself further favour with him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I know that's something I even want?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: That is for you to decide. I have told you all that I have to share.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: That is all you need to know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right then, keep your secrets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to trade in some Hallowed marks.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any of my items?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I do not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I do have some of your items here. Try not to get hit by the traps next time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to access your tool storage.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any way I could have private access to the Sepulchre? The other adventurers in there keep activating traps and messing up my timing.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: An interesting problem. But... I suppose I could grant you private access to the Hallowed Sepulchre... for a fee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: 200 Hallowed marks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that many marks on me...

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Then I'm afraid that, for now, you will have to contend with your peers activating traps for you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very well. You should now find that when you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre, you will end up in different chambers to your peers.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Speak to me again if you like this effect rescinded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very well. I shall be here if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I see you're still alive adventurer. Do you have any Hallowed marks for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about this place.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: This place was built long before the city of Darkmeyer existed, back when this land was known as Hallowvale.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Sepulchre was used as a resting place for Hallowvale's loyal followers of Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Before they were driven out by the vampyres, the Saradominists used their magic to safeguard this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Safeguard how?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The dead here were buried with the wealth they had in life. To protect these riches, the Saradominists enchanted the statues within the Sepulchre to create various defences.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Many have tried and failed to obtain the prizes buried here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay... So I presume you want me to get some of this treasure for you? How should I go about doing it?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: We don't care for a lot of what is kept here. We are only interested in the old currency of this land.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: If you find any of these Hallowed marks, I'd be willing to take them off your hands. In exchange, I can provide tools that can help you within the Hallowed Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You can keep whatever else you find for yourself.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You should know, only the most agile of adventurers will have success down there. You'll need to use your reflexes to overcome the traps within.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The Sepulchre has five floors in total, each more dangerous than the last. I hope you prove competent enough to make it all the way down.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any information about what kind of traps I can expect?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: The statues have been enchanted to shoot fire, lightning and arrows. Some also throw swords. There are also tiles that when stepped on, will teleport you somewhere else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like the perfect challenge for me! Is there anything else I should know?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Yes... It seems that there is another safeguard which prevents anyone from spending too long within the Sepulchre.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: You'll only have so much time before the magic within seals both the coffins and the stairs leading to the next floor.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Is there anything else you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go back to looting with other people?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I can remove your private access for now, if you're sure.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very well. You should now find that when you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre, your peers will join you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Speak to me again if you would like this effect restored.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I go back to looting on my own?

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I can restore your private access for you, if you're sure.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Very well. You should now find that when you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre, you will end up in different chambers to your peers.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: Speak to me again if you would like this effect restored.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I've changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I need to go.

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I do not have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

sections.title: Attempting to enter the Hallowed Sepulchre with items in the Mysterious Stranger's Item Retrieval Service

lines.speaker: Mysterious Stranger
lines.text: I have some of your things. You should come get them before you enter the Hallowed Sepulchre.
